STONED GOOSE PRODUCTIONS - SPONSORSHIP ONE-SHEET

Audience:
- 1,200+ monthly in-room attendees across Olympia and South Sound shows
- 85,000+ average monthly social impressions
- 30,000+ monthly video views

Packages:
Bronze - $500/show
- Logo placement on event graphics and ticketing page
- 1 host shoutout during sponsored show
- Brand mention in one pre-show social post

Silver - $1,250/month
- Includes Bronze deliverables
- 2 host shoutouts (opening + closing)
- Branded table signage at events
- Monthly recap with attendance + engagement

Gold - $2,500/month
- Includes Silver deliverables
- Title sponsorship positioning
- Custom 30-second ad read in each sponsored show
- Dedicated sponsored social video clip each month
- On-site activation support for giveaways or sampling
